contato-descricao: Feel free to reach out or send me a message
contato-resumo:
I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However,
 if you have other request or question, don’t 
 hesitate to contact me
about-paragraph-1: I am a front-end developer focused on building modern, accessible and responsive interfaces.
about-paragraph-2: I turn ideas into clear and functional digital experiences, always seeking technical growth and code quality.

smallprojects.project-1-description: Bot to automate messages on Whatsapp using the Baileys library.
smallprojects.project-2-description: Random password generator with customization options.
smallprojects.project-3-description: Application to convert values between different currencies using an exchange API.
smallprojects.project-4-description: Application to manage daily tasks with features to add, edit and delete.

job-description-1: I worked on the development and maintenance of back-end applications, implementing APIs, business logic, and database integrations. I also handled version control with Git, bug fixes, and performance optimization, collaborating within an agile team and following software development best practices.
job-description-2: I worked as a Mid-Level Software Developer, designing and evolving scalable solutions, defining architectures, and conducting code reviews to ensure quality and best practices. I collaborated with cross-functional teams on delivery planning and contributed to CI/CD implementation, production monitoring, and continuous application optimization.
job-description-3:
I worked as a Senior Software Developer, leading architectural decisions and driving the evolution of high-scale, mission-critical systems. I was responsible for defining technical standards, mentoring team members, conducting strategic code reviews, and ensuring long-term code quality and sustainability.

I also contributed to service decomposition, performance and reliability optimization, and actively participated in technical planning, technical debt prioritization, and roadmap definition alongside product and business teams.
